macro_markets.query: What are the most important macroeconomic and stock market news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major index movements, Fed/central bank news, and significant company earnings or announcements.

crypto_news.query: What are the most significant cryptocurrency and blockchain news from the past 24 hours? Include major price movements, regulatory news, and notable project developments.

items.title: Bitcoin Consolidates at $68,014 Amid Extreme Retail Fear and Institutional Accumulation
items.summary: Bitcoin trades at $68,014 with a Fear & Greed Index reading of 9 signaling extreme retail panic. Spot Bitcoin ETF flows rebounded with $88M net inflows led by BlackRock and Fidelity, while derivatives show weak rally dynamics with shorts covering rather than new longs entering.

items.title: Bitcoin Dips After Trump Tariff Announcement, Then Recovers
items.summary: Bitcoin fell briefly after President Trump announced plans to raise the temporary global tariff rate from 10% to 15%, but rebounded later in the session. The cryptocurrency remains up 0.7% despite the initial volatility.

items.title: Crypto Market Faces Significant Decline After 2024-2025 Surge
items.summary: The cryptocurrency market has lost approximately 40% of its value from its October 2025 peak, with the Total3 Market Cap now at $713 billion. Bitcoin has dropped over 50% from its peak to around $68,000, while Ether fell about 60% from its August 2025 all-time high of nearly $5,000.

items.title: Solana Network Shows Growth Despite 67% Price Plunge
items.summary: Despite Solana's significant price decline, the network continues to attract users with daily active wallet addresses at 6.5 million, down from an all-time high of 9 million but still substantially higher than pre-2024 levels. The network's hybrid proof-of-stake and proof-of-history mechanism enables faster transaction processing than Ethereum.

ai_news.query: What are the most important artificial intelligence and machine learning news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include new model releases, company announcements, research breakthroughs, and industry trends.

items.title: Palo Alto Networks Reports Strong AI-Driven Revenue Growth
items.summary: Palo Alto Networks announced fiscal 2026 Q2 revenue of $2.6 billion, up 15% year-over-year, with next-generation security products including AI platform Cortex XSIAM growing 33% in ARR to $6.3 billion. The company raised its full-year forecast to $11.3 billion in revenue and $8.6 billion in NGS ARR.

items.title: Sam Altman Defends AI Energy Use in Comparison to Human Training
items.summary: OpenAI CEO Sam Altman argued during a Q&A that comparisons of AI training energy to human thought are unfair, noting humans require 20 years of life and food consumption to become 'smart,' amid discussions following his meeting with India's PM Modi.

items.title: Guide Released on Hosted Open Weights AI Models and Cost Tradeoffs
items.summary: A new newsletter details getting started with hosted open weights AI, highlighting intelligence-cost tradeoffs where smarter models like GLM-5 can be cheaper per token than alternatives like Gemini 3.0 or Claude Opus 4.5.

items.title: AI's Greatest Risk in Higher Education: Redefining University Purpose
items.summary: Analysis argues AI's impact on higher education extends beyond cheating to hybrid systems and autonomous agents automating research, tutoring, and instruction, raising questions about the university's future role.

gaming.query: What are the most notable video game and gaming industry news from the past 24 hours? Include game releases, announcements, esports, and industry developments.

items.title: February 2026 PC Gaming Releases: Nioh 3, Resident Evil Requiem, and More
items.summary: February 2026 is a packed month for PC gamers with major releases including Nioh 3 (February 6), High on Life 2 (February 13), and Resident Evil Requiem (February 27), alongside numerous indie titles and early access games.

items.title: Asha Sharma Appointed CEO of Microsoft Gaming Ahead of GTA 6 Launch
items.summary: Microsoft has appointed Indian-origin executive Asha Sharma as CEO of its gaming division, overseeing Xbox strategy and positioning the company for the highly anticipated GTA 6 launch later in 2026.

items.title: xAI's Grok Chatbot Improves Baldur's Gate Game Guidance Performance
items.summary: xAI's Grok chatbot has shown marked improvement in responding to detailed questions about Baldur's Gate after the company prioritized video-game walkthrough performance, with engineers reassigned to refine responses.

tech_news.query: What are the most important technology news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major product launches, company news, and significant tech industry developments. Exclude AI-specific news.
